name: github-image-bed
title: GitHub Image Bed
description: Upload images to GitHub as an image hosting service with CDN acceleration support.
author: czh020110

commands.name: upload-from-clipboard
commands.title: Upload from Clipboard
commands.description: Upload image from clipboard to GitHub

commands.name: upload-from-clipboard-with-options
commands.title: Upload from Clipboard with Options
commands.description: Upload clipboard image and choose output format

commands.name: upload-screenshot
commands.title: Upload Screenshot
commands.description: Take screenshot and upload to GitHub

commands.name: upload-screenshot-with-options
commands.title: Upload Screenshot with Options
commands.description: Take screenshot, upload, and choose output format

commands.name: upload-from-file
commands.title: Upload from File
commands.description: Select image file and upload to GitHub

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Token
preferences.description: Your GitHub Personal Access Token with repo scope.

preferences.name: owner
preferences.title: Repository Owner
preferences.description: Owner of the GitHub repository (username or organization).

preferences.name: path
preferences.title: Upload Path
preferences.description: Folder path within the repository to store images.

preferences.name: cdnUrl
preferences.title: CDN URL Template
preferences.description: CDN URL template. Use {owner}, {repo}, {branch}, {path} as placeholders.

preferences.name: filenameTemplate
preferences.title: Filename Template
preferences.description: Template for uploaded image filename. Placeholders: {yyyy}, {yy}, {MM}, {dd}, {hh}, {mm}, {ss}, {sss}, {name}. Leave {name} for argument input.
